---
title: "Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia Data"
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


---
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{hypometrics: Physical Activity and Sleep Data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

<style>
.nobullet li{
  list-style-type: none;
}
</style>

![](hypometrics_logo2.png)

\

[Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) Data](cgm_data.html)
[Physical Activity and Sleep Data](fitbit_data.html)
**Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia Data**

## Introduction

## Data Cleaning

## Data Checking

## Data Visualising

## Data Linking

\

<center>
<font size="5">
[**Previous: Physical Activity and Sleep Data**](fitbit_data.html)
</font>
</center>
